haikus.haiku:
Coconut whispers,
Tropical sun warms the sand,
Cheers rise with sweet sips.
Happy #NationalPinaColadaDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Soft paws on warm laps,
Purring whispers fill the air,
Joyful leaps abound.
Happy #InternationalKittenDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Brush strokes paint the dawn,
Warm hues of joy and laughter,
Nature's art unveiled.
#HappyBirthdayCamillePissarro from @ClamBakeSanta

content:

Tropical sun warms the sand,
Cheers rise with sweet sips.
Happy #NationalPinaColadaDay from @ClamBakeSanta

Soft paws on warm laps,

Brush strokes paint the dawn,
